337470.「……あなたから 創失を招くものを倒した話を\n 聞いたときは 驚いたわ。\n:
I was shocked when I heard how you defeated
That Which Unmakes. To think the world really
was on the brink of disappearing...

337471.「今 こうして アストルティアがあるのは\n あなたのおかげよ。<pc>……\n:
Astoltia is able to still exist today because
of everything you've done. Thank you
so much for saving all of us...

337472.「じつはね 今日は 勇者アルヴァンさまが\n グランゼドーラを守った 記念すべき:
Actually, the reason I asked you to come here
is because today's a special dayーit's the
day that Alvan defended Gran Zedora.

337473.「この像のモデルになった １０００年前の勇者\n アルヴァンさまが 不死の魔王を:
That statue there is modeled after him. You
remember how he defeated the Immortal Demon
King, don't you?

337474.「アルヴァンさまは 盟友カミルさまを守るため\n たったひとりで 禁忌の秘術を使:
To protect Kamil, his sworn Ally, he used a
forbidden art to seal away the power of
immortality entirely within himself.

337475.「その偉大なる功績を称え 毎年この日に\n 祝宴を催しているのよ。今年は\n あ:
We hold a celebratory feast every year on this
day to honor his great sacrifice. Why not
join us for this year's celebration?<yesno><close>

337476.「そんなこと言わずに お願い！\n 私の大切な盟友である あなたと\n 一緒に:
Come now, don't be like that! Please...nothing
would make me happier than to celebrate this
with my most precious Ally!<yesno><close>

337477.「ありがとう！\n 一緒に 楽しみましょうね <pc>！: Thank you! Let's both enjoy ourselves, okay?

337478.ほどなくして グランゼドーラ城の人々が\nこの特別な日を祝うため 集まってきた。:
Before long, the people of Gran Zedora
gathered together to celebrate this very
special day.

337479.そして 祝いの宴が始まった！: Then the celebratory feast had begun!

337480.「皆の者 よくぞ集まってくれた。: Thank you all for gathering here today.

337481.「今 我々が こうして平穏な日々を\n 送ることができるのは 歴代の勇者が\n:
We are able to enjoy these days of peace
precisely because of the Heroes of the past
destroying the threats of the Demon Kings.

337482.「今日は 勇者アルヴァンが 命と引き換えに\n 不死の魔王を 討ち破った日……。:
Today is the day that Alvan gave his own life
to defeat the Immortal Demon King...so let us
celebrate his great achievement.

337483.「勇者アルヴァンと 盟友カミルに 乾杯！:
Cheers! To both Alvan and Kamil, Hero and
Ally!

337485.「<pc> 久しいな。\n そなたの活躍ぶりは 聞いているぞ。:
Long time no see.
I've heard all about what you've done.

337486.「あなたは この宴に 参加するのは\n 初めてでしたね。:
This is the first time you've attended this
celebration, yes?

337487.「グランゼドーラ城の 一流シェフが\n ウデによりをかけて用意した 料理は\n:
Each dish is meticulously prepared by the
castle's top chefs. You'll find them
absolutely exquisite!

337488.「中でも このチョコレートケーキは 格別なので\n ぜひ 召し上がってください。:
This chocolate cake in particular is just
divine. Please be sure to try it!

337489.「……１０００年前 不死の魔王との戦いで\n 勇者アルヴァンを 助けてくれたこと:
For the help you gave Alvan in defeating the
Immortal Demon King so many years ago...
I once again want to express my gratitude.

337490.「不死の魔王の 一件だけではない。\n そなたには これまで 数え切れぬほど\n:
And only that.. I can't count the
amount of times you've helped me.

337491.「これからも 盟友として\n ……いや 最高の友として\n 勇者姫アンルシアを:
Please continue to support Anlucia, not
only as her Ally...but as her closest friend,
too.

337492.「……<pc>\n あなたと出会ってから 今まで\n いろいろなことが あったわ:
So many things have happened since we first
met...

337493.「勇者としての運命を 受け入れてから\n トーマ兄さまの分まで 精一杯\n がん:
Since accepting my fate as the Hero,
I've done the best I can... Even living for
my brother's sake, too...

337494.「私が これまで 勇者としての\n 使命を果たせてきたのは あなたのおかげよ。\:
The reason I've been able to fulfill my duty
is Hero is because of you, <pc>.
Thank you for everything.

337496.「地震とは どこか揺れ方が 違う気がしたけれど\n いったい なんだったのかしら:
That shaking was no ordinary earthquake...
Just what was that?

337499.「えっ？\n エテーネルキューブから 声が聞こえたの？:
What? You heard a voice coming from your
Ethenel Cube?

337500.「キューロピア……前に あなたから\n 話を聞いたことがあるわ。キュロン人と呼ば:
Kyuropia? You told me about it before.
That's where Kyururu's friends live, right?
They're called Kyuronians?

337501.「……そう マキュリ集落という\n 村があるのね。もしかしたら その村の誰かが\:
I see...so there's a village there called
Makyuri? Perhaps someone there is calling
out to you for help?

337502.「こちらのことは 気にしないで。\n 揺れは おさまったようだけど\n 祝いの席:
Don't worry about us. I don't think there will
be any more shaking, but the celebration
seems to be wrapping up anyway.

337503.「どうか 気をつけて\n 行ってきてね <pc>。: Be careful on your trip, okay?

337512.「タイムカプセルの時は 世話になったですキュ。\n おかげさまで ロッキュネの死:
Thanks again for your help with the Time
Capsule. Because of that, I was finally able
to accept that Rokyune had died.

337513.「あれから 俺は 新しい試みを始めたのですが\n どうにも うまくいかなくて……:
Since then, I've been focusing on a new
venture, but...it's not going well at all.
I was hoping you could help me, kyu.

337514.「ところで キミは どうして\n ここに来たんですキュ？: By the way...what did you come here for, kyu?

337515.<pc>は エテーネルキューブから\n発せられた 謎の声に導かれて\nキューロピ:
<pc> explains to Kyubo that <if_woman>she<else>he<endif>
was guided to Kyuropia by a mysterious voice
that came from the Ethenel Cube.

337516.「ふむふむ。\n その声というのは ひょっとして……。:
Hmm...
A voice... Could it be...?

337517.「……じつは タイムカプセルの一件のあと\n 俺は ある目的のため\n キュロン:
Actually, after the whole thing with the Time
Capsule, I started growing some Kyurongrass
for a specific reason.

337519.「でも ついに その時が来たようですキュ。\n この実に エテーネルキューブを\:
But it looks now's the time, kyu! Please
hold your Ethenel Kyube to the fruit, kyu.

337521.「思ったとおりですキュ……！\n ようやく 俺の努力が 実を結びますキュ！:
Just as I thought, kyu!
My efforts are finally bearing fruit, kyu!

337523.「……やっと ボクの身体を\n 手に入れられたキュ！ やっぱり ボクには\n こ:
Finally, I got my own body back, kyu!
Indeed, this body does suit me best, kyu.

337528.「最近 ボクの意識が 混濁し始めたのは\n ボクの身体となる実がなって 世界の一:
Lately, my consciousness began to muddle...it
was because the fruit had ripened, and I was
separating from the world back into my body.

337529.「ボクは ボク自身を見失わないように\n <pc>の エテーネルキューブに\n:
I fixated my consciousness on
<pc>'s Ethenel Cube so that I
wouldn't lose my sense of self.

337586.「無事に 到着したキュね。\n 今のところ アストルティアに\n 異変はないよう:
We're back safe and sound, kyu.
Astoltia seems okay by the look of things,
kyu.

337588.「……いや 揺れているのは\n 地面だけじゃないキュ！\n 空間ごと 揺れている:
No, it's not just the ground, kyu!
The very space around us is shaking
too, kyu!

337589.「これは 時空震キュ！ 気を付けるキュ……！: This is a spacetime tremor, kyu! Be careful!

337591.「時空震は 時空に何らかの異常が発生した際に\n 起きる 空間そのものの揺れのこ:
A spacetime tremor is when some kind of
anomaly occurs in spacetime, causing space
itself to shake. Though, it's quite rare.

337592.「前にも 時空震があったキュ？\n ボクの違和感といい……アストルティアの時空に:
There was a tremor earlier, kyu? Considering
these strange feelings...then there's no doubt
something's happening to Astoltia's spacetime.

337593.「<pc> 異常の原因を探しに\n これから 時の回廊へ 行ってみないキュ？:
Why don't we try going to the Corridor of
Time to see what's causing this anomaly, kyu?

337594.「ああ……時の回廊っていうのは キミが\n エテーネルキューブで 時間跳躍すると:
Ah, right...the Corridor of Time is what you
pass through when you time jump with the
Kyube, kyu. It's like a tunnel, kyu.

337595.「それじゃ さっそく 行ってみるキュ！: Come on! Let's go check it out, kyu!

337597.「こんなもの 今までは なかったキュ。\n きっと これが 異常をきたしている原:
I've never seen anything like it, kyu.
This must be the cause of the anomaly, kyu!

337600.見たことがあるような 無いような場所だ。\nここは いったい どこだろうか……？:
This place looks both familiar and unfamiliar
at the same time. Just where exactly is
this...?

337601.砂浜に 鈴のようなものが 落ちている。:
Something that resembles a bell lies in the
sand...

337602.<pc>は 時渡りの鈴を\n使えるようになった！<me 71>:
<pc> can now use the
Chime of Time!<me 71>

337603.メインコマンドの 『どうぐ』の中にある\n『時渡りの鈴』を使うと 元の世界と\n:
The Chime of Time in the Items menu will
allow you to travel between Astoltia and this
world.

337604.さらに この世界で訪れた場所が 登録されるほか\n各地にある『渡りの鐘』を しら:
Furthermore, locations that you visit within
this world can be registered as destinations
by searching for "Passing Bells".

338871.「そして 先日 この珍しい実をならせることに\n 成功したんですキュ。ただ……な:
And just the other day, I managed to get this
rare fruit to sprout, kyu...but even so, it
hasn't grown at all since, kyu.

338872.<pc>は エテーネルキューブを\n珍しい実に かざした！:
<pc> holds the Ethenel Cube
up to the rare fruit!

338873.「キュルル 復活おめでとうですキュ！\n キミには ずっと 恩返ししたいと\n:
Congratulations on your return, Kyururu!
I always hoped I'd get the chance to repay you
for everything you did, kyu.

338874.「それで 古老マキュリに相談して キミの\n 身体となる実を 育てたんですキュ。:
That's why I consulted with Elder Makyuri to cultivate the fruit that would become your body, kyu. Since I'm already in tune with your
soul, this is something only I could do, kyu.

338878.「……ところで <pc>。\n さっきから キミのクチから\n 甘い香りが プン:
By the way, <pc>...
I'm smelling something sweet coming
from your mouth, kyu.

338879.「お祝いの宴で チョコレートケーキを\n 食べたっキュ！？\n ずるいキュ！ ボ:
You ate chocolate cake at some celebration,
kyu?! That's not fair! I want some too, kyu!!

338880.「……っと こんな話をしている場合じゃ\n なかったキュ。じつは 意識が混濁して:
...But now's not the time for that, kyu. The truth is, I sensed that something was terribly wrong when my mind was still hazy. That's
what woke me up, kyu.

338881.「キューロピアで ゆっくりしたいところだけど\n そうもいかないキュ。\n すぐ:
I'd love to relax here in Kyuropia, but
there's no time for that, kyu. We have to get
back to Astoltia right away, kyu.

338882.「そういうことなら 俺たちの船で\n 送り届けてやるですキュ。\n 落ち着いたら:
You can take a ride back in our ship then,
kyu. I hope you'll come back to visit once
things settle down, kyu.

338883.<pc>たちは キューボに見送られ\n航界船を使って マデ島にある時見の泉へ戻っ:
<pc> and co. return to the
Timeseer Spring via navigational ship as
Kyubo sees them off.

339984.「くそっ……いくらでも わいてきやがる！\n キリがねえ……！:
Damn it...they just keep coming!
Is there no end?!

339985.「さすがは 我らが ローマス隊長！\n あの若さで 隊長を\n 務めているだけの:
Just what I'd expect from you, Captain Romas!
You don't earn that title as such a young age
without good reason.

339986.「隊長がいれば 百人力だぜ！: With the Captain here, we're unbeatable!

339987.「……って な…なななんだ コイツは！\n こんなのがいるなんて 聞いてないって:
H-hey, what is that thing?!
Nobody said anything about THAT!

339989.「……おまえが 魔物たちの親玉だな。\n これ以上 おまえたちの好きにはさせない:
So you're the leader of these monsters, are
you? It's time I put I stop to this!

339994.<cs_pchero>は 見過ごそうとしたが\nちくりと 良心が痛んだ……！:
<cs_pchero> tries looking the other way,
but <if_woman>her<else>his<endif> conscience says otherwise!

339998.「見事なウデ前ですね。\n おかげで 助かりました。:
Your skills are quite impressive!
Thank you for your help.

339999.「私は 近隣にある カラマドの町の守備隊\n 『カラマドの剣』で 隊長を務めてい:
My name is Romas, and I am captain of the
"Sword of Calamad"ーthe garrison of the
nearby town of Calamad.

340000.「こっちは部下の チラリとザガンド。\n それから……:
These two are my subordinates, Chirari and
Zagand. And that's...

340003.「近ごろ この辺りの魔物が 凶暴化していて\n 討伐しにきたところだったんですよ:
The monsters in this area have become pretty
aggressive as of late, so we came here to
thin them out.

340004.「あなたが 親玉を倒してくれたので\n 魔物たちも じきに 落ち着くことでしょう:
Now that we've taken down their leader, the
other monsters should soon calm down.
Anyways... You are?

340006.「<cs_pchero>さん 私たちを助けてくれて\n 本当に ありがとう。:
You really saved us back there.
Thank you so much.

340007.「あんたがいなけりゃ こいつなんて\n あっという間に あの世行きだったぜ。:
If you hadn't shown up, then this guy here
would've been toast for sure.

340008.「痛っ……！\n そこ怪我してんだから やめろよ……！: Ouch! Stop that, you know I got hurt there!

340010.「……何か事情が おありのようだ。\n よかったら 話を 聞かせてもらえませんか:
I suppose you have your reasons... If you're
willing, would you tell us what happened?
Maybe we can help.

340011.「ここで 立ち話を続けるのも なんですし\n ぜひ 我々が暮らす カラマドの町に:
We probably shouldn't stand around here and
chat. You should come and visit Calamad.
That's where we're all from.

340012.「カラマドの町は この森を出て\n 北に向かったところに ありますよ。\n 共に:
The town's just north of the forest.
We can head there together.

340013.「みんなー！\n カラマドの剣が 帰ってきたよ！:
Hey, everyone!
The Sword of Calamad's back!

340015.「ご苦労だったねえ。\n その傷は 魔物に やられたのかい？:
You've all worked so hard, I see.
Did the monsters do that to you?

340016.「ああ。だが もう 心配ないよ。\n この方……<pc>さんのおかげで\n 暴れ:
We did, but there's nothing to worry about
anymore. This is <pc>...we have <if_woman>her<else>him<endif>
to thank for taking down their leader.

340018.「あんた すごいじゃないか！\n ローマス隊長みたいに ウデの立つもんが\n 他:
You must truly be something special!
I had no idea there were others as capable
as Captain Romas here.

340019.「ああ こうしちゃいられないよ。\n 町のみんなに 伝えてこなくちゃね。:
Ah, I haven't a moment to waste!
I have to go and tell the others!

340020.「この町は 気のいい人たちばかりだ。\n 皆に 危害が及ばずにすんだのは\n あ:
This town is full of many kind people.
Thanks to you, nobody had to get hurt.

340021.「私たちは 療養所に 立ち寄り\n 怪我の手当てを受けます。あなたは\n 町でも:
We'll head over to the sanatorium to get our
injuries treated. Feel free to explore the
town in the meantime as you like.

340022.「療養所は この町の北……\n 教会のとなりに ありますよ。\n では また後ほ:
The sanitorium's in the north part of town,
next to the church. See you later.

340023.「おやまあ ずいぶん 派手にやられたようだね。: My my... I see you've taken quite the beating.

340028.「あんたは そっちで寝てな！: And you! Go sleep over there!

340032.「ボクも やさしく介抱して～。\n アンネリゼちゅわん<heart>:
Please take good care of me too,
Anneliese! <heart>

340035.「任務は どうだった？\n どこか ケガしてない？\n 私 心配で 心配で……。:
How was the mission? Did you get hurt?
I was so worried, and...

340036.「俺は 大丈夫だよ。\n ただいま アンネリゼ。:
I'm fine, Anneliese. I'm back safe and
sound.

340037.「ふふっ。\n 兄さんったら いつまで 兜を被ってるの？\n ちゃんと 顔を見せ:
Hehe... Just how long are you going to wear
that helmet? Let me see your face.

340040.「魔物に襲われたところを 助けてくださった\n <pc>さんだ。:
This is <pc>. <if_woman>She<else>He<endif> helped us
when we were ambushed by some monsters.

340041.「……おや？\n <pc>さん どうかしましたか？:
What's the matter?
Is something wrong?

340042.「……そうだったのか。\n 俺たちは <pc>の知り合いに\n そっくりなんだな:
I see... So the two of us look exactly like
people you already know.

340043.「ユーマグラムのどこかに ３人は似た人が\n いると言うが……兄妹そろってだとは:
They say that everyone has a lookalike
somewhere in Yumagram...but for siblings like
us to both have one? What an odd coincidence.

340044.「では 改めて 紹介させてくれ。\n 俺の妹の アンネリゼ。\n 僧侶として 療:
Allow me to properly introduce you. This is
Anneliese, my sister. She works here in the
sanitorium as a priestess.

340045.「初めまして <pc>さん。\n 兄さんを 救ってくださって\n ありがとうござ:
Great to meet you, <pc>!
I can't thank you enough for helping my
brother.

340046.「本当に 助かったよ。\n 危うく 妹との約束を破るところだった。:
You really came through for us.
I was nearly about to break my promise
to my sister.

340047.「私たち 小さい頃に両親を亡くして\n ふたりで 暮らしているの。:
We lost our parents when we were young, so
the two of us have been living together since.

340048.「だから 兄さんが 任務で町を出る時は\n 絶対に 生きて帰ってねって いつも\:
That's why...whenever he leaves town for a
mission, I tell him to promise me that he will
come back alive.

340049.「……それで <pc>は\n なぜ あんな場所に？\n 何があったのか 聞かせて:
So what brought you to that place from before?
Can you tell me what happened?

340050.<pc>は ローマスとアンネリゼに\nいつの間にか 見知らぬ地に いたこと\n友:
<pc> explains that <if_woman>she<else>he<endif> somehow
ended up in this mysterious place, and
was separated from <if_woman>her<else>his<endif> friend.

340051.「……なるほど。よくわからないうちに\n この地に 流れ着いていたと。:
I see... So you ended up here without really
knowing the reason why.

340052.「なんとも 奇妙な話だが\n それよりも その友人が 心配だな。:
It is a rather strange story, I'll admit.
But I'm more worried about that friend of
yours.

340053.「君ひとりで 慣れぬ地での捜索は 難儀だろう。\n 命を助けてもらった せめても:
It's no simple task searching by yourself in
unfamiliar territory. Please let us help you
as thanks for saving my life.

340054.「ただ……すまない。\n 俺は このあと 外せない所用があって\n すぐには チ:
But...sorry. I actually have an appointment
later that I can't miss, so I'll be awhile
before I can help.

340055.「ひとまず アンネリゼと共に この町の人たちに\n 話を聞いてみては どうだろう:
For now, why not ask around town together
with Anneliese?

340056.「町の皆と親交のある 妹なら\n きっと 役に立ってくれると思うよ。\n アンネ:
She's close with everyone here in town, so I'm
sure she'll be a big help. I'll leave that to
you, Anneliese.

340058.「それじゃ <pc>さん。\n お友達の名前と特徴を 教えてもらえるかしら？:
So then...could you tell me your friend's
name and what they look like?

340060.「そう…… キュルルっていうのね。\n とても小さくて 水色の身体をしていて\n:
I see... Kyururu, was it? He's very small,
has a light blue body, and can fly?

340061.「ひょっとして 動物のお友達なのかしら……？\n そんな生き物は 見たことがない:
Could he be some kind of animal...? I've never
seen a creature like how you described him,
but I'm jealous that you're friends with one.

340062.「それに チョコレートが好きなのね。\n いったい どんな子なのかしら……？\n:
And he likes chocolate, too? Just what kind
of animal is he...? I'd really like to meet
him, too.

340063.「とにかく 今聞いた特徴を手がかりに\n 町の人たちに お友達を見てないか\n:
Anyways... Let's ask around town if anyone's
seen your friend!

340065.「おや アンネリゼじゃないかい。\n こんなところで会うなんて 奇遇だね。:
Well, if it isn't Anneliese!
What a coincidence to bump into you here.

340066.「あんたたちも 前代未聞の珍獣を\n 見にきたのかい？:
Did you two come to see this bizarre,
never-before-seen creature as well?

340068.「そうさ。この劇場は いつも\n 珍しい魔物を見せるって うたってるけど\n 今:
You got it! This theater's always shown some
unusual monsters, but this time the main
event is an extremely rare creature.

340071.「私たち <pc>さんのお友達を\n 捜しているの。ここの主人が その子を\n:
We've been looking for <pc>'s
friend. We heard that the owner here
may have took him in...

340072.「よくわからないけど\n そりゃあ 実際に 見てみるしかないね。:
Can't say I understand, but I guess the only
way to know is to see it for yourselves.

340073.「いいさね！ お代は あたしが持つから\n あんたたちも 見ていきな。:
Sure, why not! The tickets are on me, so you
two should stay and watch, too.

340075.「みなさん！ ようこそ\n ショルデンのミラクルショー☆劇場へ！:
Ladies and gentlemen!
Welcome to Sholden's Miracle Show Theatre!

340076.「本日は わたくし 奇跡の伝道師ショルデンが\n みなさんを 珍しい魔物たちの楽:
Today I, Sholdenーmiracle evangelistーwill
be your guide to a paradise filled with rare
and exotic monsters!

340077.「まず始めに 登場するのは\n 世にも珍しい 芸のできるメタルスライム！:
First up...a truly rare Metal Slime that has
a trick or two up its sleeve!

340078.「ただでさえ 幸運なものだけしか遭遇できない\n メタルスライムが 珠玉の芸をこ:
Only the truly fortunate ever encounter a Metal Slime to begin with. Seeing one perform such extraordinary feats is a once-in-a-
lifetime chance!

340079.「あれは ただの スライムだね。\n どうりで 逃げないわけだよ。:
That's just a regular ol' Slime.
No wonder it didn't scurry away...

340080.「本当だわ……！\n 身体を メタル色に\n カラーリングしていたのね！:
It's true! I guess its body was colored to
look like metal!

340081.「さて お次に登場するのは エマージュ海岸で\n 捕獲した 世にも恐ろしい サメ:
Next...the truly terrifying shark man we
captured off the Emerging Coast! Feast your
eyes on his spectacular skills!

340082.「ふふっ。サメ男っていうから\n どんなものかと 思ったけれど\n これはこれで:
Hee hee... I wondered what a "shark man"
would actually be like...but it ended up
being so cute.

340083.「……ったく あれは 助手のサポルじゃないか。\n 前回は 狼男をやってたよ。こ:
Give me a break... That's my assistant Saporu. Wasn't he playing a werewolf last time...? I don't really have high hopes for this supposed
"rare creature" after all that...

340084.「それでは いよいよ\n 本日最後の 魔物の登場です！\n いや……はたして 魔:
And last, but certainty NOT least! The final
monster of today makes its debut! But...
is it really a monster?!

340085.「その正体は 謎に包まれておりますが\n みなさん お待ちかねの 前代未聞かつ\:
Its true identity, shrouded in mystery... Now is the moment you've all been waiting for! The world's most bizarre creature, the likes
of which you've never seen!

340086.「なんだい あれは……！\n 本当に 見たこともない生き物じゃないか！:
What is that?! I've never seen anything like
it!

340088.「ショルデンさんに 事情を話せば\n きっと 連れ戻せるはず……。:
If you explain the situation to Sholden, then
I'm sure he'll give him back to you...

340092.<pc>と ナイチルは\n倒れてしまった アンネリゼを\n彼女の家に 運んだ。:
<pc> and Naichir carry the
unconscious Anneliese back to her home.

340094.「こいつは ヤツの使い魔……。\n まさか この近くに……。:
That's...one of HIS familiars...
Is he somewhere nearby...?

340095.「……っと <pc> 失礼したね。\n 君ほどの ウデの持ち主なら\n 俺が倒す:
Sorry to intrude, <pc>.
I'm sure you could have taken care
of that by yourself.

340097.「魔物が どこかで 手に入れた物だろうか……？:
Maybe that monster picked it up from
somewhere?

340098.「<pc>は 友人を捜しにきたのかい？\n アンネリゼは 一緒じゃないのか。:
You were looking for your friend, right?
Wasn't Anneliese with you?

340099.<pc>は ローマスに\nキュルルが 小劇場の主人に\n捕まっていること……:
<pc> explains to Romas that
Kyururu is currently being held by the
owner of the Little Theatre...

340100.アンネリゼが 気を失ってしまい\nナイチルに頼まれて バイタル草を\n採りにきた:
...and that Anneliese had fainted, so
Naichir asked <if_woman>her<else>him<endif> to collect
some Hearty Herbs.

340102.「とにかく 俺の家に 戻ろう！\n そのバイタル草を 早く\n ナイチルさんに:
Let's head back to my house. We have to
hurry and get that Hearty Herb to
Naichir!

340105.「気が付いたようだね。\n 大丈夫かい？:
Looks like you've come to.
How are you feeling?

340106.「ええ……。\n ここは 私の家……？:
Yes, I'm fine...
Is this my house...?

340107.「小劇場で 突然 倒れて\n そこの嬢ちゃんと ここまで運んだんだよ。:
You collapsed out of nowhere at the Theatre,
so that young lady and I carried you here.

340111.「あ…あいつが……いたの……。\n ローブに 身を包んでいたけれど……あれは\n:
H-he was there...wearing a robe...
He's the one who killed Mother and
Father...

340114.「そんな まさか……！\n 見間違いじゃないのかい？:
No...that can't be!
Are you sure that's what you really
saw?

340118.「なに <pc>は\n 魔皇のことを 知らないのか？: What? You don't know about the Dark Despot?

340119.「魔皇とは……魔大陸と呼ばれる地にある\n 魔物を率いる国家 ユーマギア魔皇国を:
The Dark Despot is an immortal emperor who
reigns over the Yumagia Empire. It's located
in the Darklandsーa place full of monsters.

340120.「はるか昔から 君臨し続け かつては\n 世界全土を支配すべく 戦乱の渦を巻き起:
He has reigned since ages past, and once
plunged the world into chaos through war in a
bid to conquer it...as the epitome of evil.

340121.「その征服戦争は 数千年にわたり続き\n 多くの国々と 数多の人々の命が\n 魔:
That war of conquest lasted thousands of
years. Many countries and countless lives were
lost at the hands of his army of monsters.

340122.「ところが ある時 魔皇の軍勢は\n 引き潮のごとく 一斉に 魔大陸に引き上げ\:
However, there came a point when his forces
withdrew en masse back to the Darklands.
They've been quiet ever since.

340123.「しかし １０年前 その沈黙を破り\n 突然 この町の付近にある 亡国の遺構に\:
But ten years ago, they ended up breaking that
silence when one of his followers suddenly
appeared in the Lost Vestige outside town.

340124.「当時 聖職者だった俺たちの母は\n 亡国の遺構に棲みつく 亡霊を弔うため\n:
At the time, our mother was a priestess and
our father a garrison soldier. They visited
those ruins to appease the restless spirits.

340125.「そして……魔皇の手先に出くわし\n 殺されたんだ。:
But then...the Dark Despot's follower
found them and killed them.

340128.「最近 この辺りの魔物が 凶暴化していたのも\n 魔皇が 何か企んでいる影響では:
I was worried that the recent uptick in
monster aggression was due to the Despot
scheming something...

340132.「……やはり ヤツが 絡んでいたようだな。\n しかし まさか 町中にまで\n:
Then he really is a part of all this...
I never would have guessed that he would
sneak into town, though...

340133.「小劇場に 現れたとなると\n そこで見つかった 君の友人や\n 観客たちの身が:
If he showed up at the Little Theatre, then I
worry about your friend and the other people
that saw him there.

340143.「ダメだ……息が ない……。\n …………くそッ！！:
No... He's not breathing...
Damn it!

340145.「君は たしか……\n ショルデンさんの助手の サポルだな？:
You're...Sholden's assistant, right?
Saporu, was it?

340146.「私は カラマドの剣の ローマスだ。\n 怖がる必要はない。:
I'm Romas of the Sword of Calamad.
You needn't be afraid any longer.

340148.「落ち着いて……ゆっくりで いいから\n 何があったのか 聞かせてくれないか？:
Just stay calm... Take your time and tell me
what happened.

340149.「とっ…突然 ローブの大男が 現れてっ……\n 親方を こ…殺っ……！:
S-suddenly this big guy in a robe came
and...and killed the boss!

340150.「やはり ヤツの仕業か……！\n それで そいつは どこに行ったんだ？:
So he IS the one behind all this!
Do you know where he went after that?

340151.「親方が 手に入れた め…珍しい生き物を\n 檻ごと奪って……そのまま どこかに:
H...he snatched that rare creature the boss
found, cage and all...and then left. I-I heard
him say something about the L-Lost Vestige!

340153.「もしかしたら 亡国の遺構に\n 向かったのかもしれない。１０年前のことといい\:
It's likely that's where he's headed next,
then. Considering what happened there ten
years ago...what is even left there?

340154.「その 珍しい生き物というのが\n <pc>の友人なのか？\n すぐに 助けにい:
That rare creature is your friend?!
We have to go and help him, right now!

340155.「や…やめたほうがいい！ あんな 恐ろしいヤツ\n 見たことがないよ！ いくら:
Y...you shouldn't! I've never seen someone so
terrifying before! Even the Sword of Calamad
doesn't stand a chance against him...

340156.「誰が相手だろうと\n 平気で 人を殺めるようなヤツを\n 野放しには できない:
I can't let someone who kills without a second
thought just roam free. It doesn't matter who
they are.

340157.「だが……隊員たちは まだ\n 先の戦いの傷も いえていない。\n あいつらを:
But my soldiers are still recovering from
our last battle... They're in no condition to
come along.

340158.「……<pc>。\n 君のウデを見込んで 頼みがある。\n どうか共に 亡国の遺:
<pc>... You've shown me that your
skills are more than capable. Pleaseーwill
you come with me to the Lost Vestige?<yesno><close>

340159.「君の友人のためにも どうか頼む。\n 共に 亡国の遺構に向かい 友人を救いだそ:
Please, for your friend's sake! We have to go
to those ruins to rescue him!<yesno><close>

340160.「ありがとう。\n 君が一緒に 来てくれるなら\n これほど 心強いことはない。:
Thank you! Having you by my side is a huge
relief.

340161.「カラマド高原の東にある 亡国の遺構は\n はるか昔 魔皇軍によって 滅ぼされた:
The Lost Vestige to the east of the Calamad
Plateau are the ruins of a kingdom destroyed
by the Dark Despot's army long ago.

340162.「ヤツの企みが わからない以上\n 何が起きても おかしくはない。\n 念入りに:
We don't know what that man's plan is, so
there's no telling what might happen. We'll
get ready, and then move out!

340164.「……１０年前 俺たちの両親は\n ここで 殺されたんだ。:
This is where our parents were murdered...
Ten years ago.

340165.「あの日以来 この地は閉鎖され\n 足を踏み入れることも なかったが\n いまだ:
This place has been closed off since then, and
I never came back.. Yet here I am again, and
I can't stop shaking.

340166.「アンネリゼに 大グチを たたいておきながら\n 情けない……。こんなことじゃ\:
I talked so big in front of Anneliese, and now
look at me... What a disgrace. I'll never be
able to defeat him like this...

340168.「間違いない……母さんが 死者を弔う際に\n 使っていた 聖印だ。１０年前 ヤツ:
There's no mistaking it... This is sacred
seal my mother used to mourn the dead.
She must've dropped it back then...

340169.「父さん……母さん……。\n 俺に チカラを貸してくれ……。:
Mother... Father...
I need your strength...

340170.「……すまない。もう 大丈夫だ。\n 先に進もう <pc>！:
...Sorry about that. I'm fine now.
Let's keep moving!

340172.「かつて 手にすることは かなわなかったが\n 町で見つけた古文書の通り 秘宝は:
It's just as the ancient texts from that town
said...the treasure was indeed hidden within
this throne room. At last, I have found it.

340174.「なんだ 貴様らは……。\n カラマドの者か？:
And just who are you...?
Did you come from Calamad?

340175.「やっぱり おまえは あの時の……！\n １０年前も この遺構に来ていたな？\n:
You ARE the same person from back then!
You were here ten years ago, weren't you?!
Just what are you after?!

340176.「……フン。\n 秘宝の膨大なエネルギーを 前にして\n その価値がわからぬとは:
Hmph...to stand before the vast energy of this
treasured artifact without even knowing a
thing about its worth... How foolish.

340177.「それを どうする気だ？\n 魔物たちが凶暴化したのも おまえの仕業か！？:
Just what do you plan on doing with that?
Was the monsters turning savage your doing,
too?!

340178.「俺は こいつを 回収しにきただけだ。\n 雑魚どものことなど 知るものか。:
I just came here to retrieve this.
I care not about those meager beings.

340179.「……だが 思わぬ収穫もあった。\n この奇妙な生物を 陛下に献上すれば\n お:
Still, this wasn't without its rewards...
Presenting this strange creature to my lord
will surely please him.

340180.「……それにしても 使い魔の帰りが遅い。\n バイタル草で こいつを目覚めさせ\:
But my familiar has still not returned...I had
intended to use a Hearty Herb to wake this
thing up to pry for some information.

340181.「この石を持っていた 魔物のことか？\n そいつなら 俺が倒したよ。:
You're talking about the monster that was
carrying this? I took care of it.

340182.「人間ふぜいが 調子に乗りおって……。\n この剣魔ゼルゲイドの\n 邪魔をする:
A mere human, yet so arrogant...
I, Zelgeid, will show you what it means
to get in my way.

340184.アンネリゼは バイタル草を使って\n根気よく キュルルを 介抱し続けた。:
Using some Hearty Herbs, Anneliese tirelessly
tended to Kyururu and nursed him back to
health.

340187.「アンルシア……？\n 珍しい格好を してるキュね……。: Anlucia...? What weird clothes though, kyu...

340188.「ふふっ あなたも 私にそっくりな子と\n 勘違いしているみたいね。\n 私は:
Hmm hmm...I think you might be mistaking me
for someone who looks just like me.
I'm Anneliese.

340189.「<cs_pchero>……？\n 思いだしたキュ！ ボクと キミは\n 時の回:
<cs_pchero>...? I remember now, kyu!
We got separated in the Corridor of Time,
kyu!

340190.「<cs_pchero>も 無事でよかったキュ。\n ここが どこなのか 検索し:
I'm glad you're not hurt, kyu.
Let's see if I can figure out where we are,
kyu.

340191.「キュルルルル……！？ ボクのチカラが\n 使えないキュ！ ここが いつの時代な:
Kyururu...?! I can't use my power at all, kyu!
I have absolutely no idea what time period
this is, kyu!

340192.「……ところで <cs_pchero>。\n キミの持っている それは なんだキ:
On another note... What is it you have there,
kyu? I'm sensing a special power coming from
whatever it is, kyu.

340193.「海岸で目を覚ましたとき キミのそばに\n 落ちていたキュ？ もしかしたら 時の:
So you found this nearby when you woke up on
the coast, kyu? Maybe it belongs to that
person we bumped into in the Corridor, kyu...

340194.「とにかく ここがどこなのか 調べる必要が\n あるキュ。ボクの理解の範疇を超え:
In any case, we need to figure out where we are, kyu. This place is beyond my comprehension, so there may be a cause of
the anomaly somewhere in this land, kyu.

340195.「でも ボクの姿は 目立つから\n 普段は キミの エテーネルキューブに\n 隠:
But I do stand out too much, so I'll hide
inside your Ethenel Kyube when I'm not
needed, kyu.

340197.「ザガンドさん そんなに慌てて どうしたの？: Zagand? What has you in such a hurry?

340198.「先ほど カラマドの剣の詰め所に\n ソルベルム王国からの使者が 参ったのだ。:
A messenger from the Solbelm Kingdom arrived
at our outpost just a short while ago.

340199.「なんでも ソルベルム王国を訪ねた\n ローマス隊長が 王国軍に同行し 任務に出:
They said that after Romas made his way to
Solbelm, he accompanied the royal army on
some mission...but has since disappeared.

340201.「すぐにでも 捜索に向かいたいところなのだが\n 我々は この町を守る責務がある:
We would leave to search for him immediately,
but we have a responsibility to protect the
town. We can't afford to abandon our post...

340202.「それなら 私が 捜しにいくわ。: Then I'll go and look for him.

340203.「な…何を 申されるか！\n 魔物たちが 落ち着いたとはいえ\n 町の外が危険な:
L-listen to yourself! While it is true the
monsters have calmed down, going outside
of town is still very dangerous!

340204.「<cs_pchero>さん お願い。あなたに\n こんなことを頼むのは 申し訳:
Please, <cs_pchero>... I'm sorry that
I have to ask this of you, but... Do you think
you could come along with me?<yesno><close>

340205.「ずっと この町にいても 仕方ないキュ。\n ここがどこなのか 調べるためにも\:
Staying here in town won't do you any good,
kyu. How about lending her a hand so we can
figure out where we are, kyu?<yesno><close>

340206.「ありがとう！\n まずは ソルベルム王国に行って\n 王様から 話を 聞いてみ:
Thank you! Let's first make our way to
Solbelm and see what the king has to say.

340207.「ソルベルム王国は カラマド高原の南にある\n 橋を渡って ソルベルム領を 北東:
We can get there if we cross the bridge to the
south of the Calamad Plateau, and then by
heading northeast through the Solbelm region.

340208.「もはや アンネリゼ殿を止めるすべは\n なさそうであるな……。:
I guess there's no point in trying to stop
you...

340209.「<cs_pchero>殿 どうか\n 隊長とアンネリゼ殿のことを よろしく頼む:
<cs_pchero>... We leave the
Captain and Anneliese in your capable hands.

340210.「思わぬ邪魔が入ったが 目的は達成した。\n その生物なら くれてやる。:
An unexpected setback...but no matter.
I got what I came here for. As for that
creature...I've no longer a use for it.

340214.「アンネリゼ……どうして ここに……。\n もう 大丈夫なのか？:
Anneliese... Why are you here...?
Are you feeling better?

340215.「ええ。兄さんたちが 遺構に向かったって聞いて\n いてもたっても いられなくて:
I am. I couldn't just sit around when I heard
you came to these ruins... Are you okay?

340216.「隊長！ 俺たちを 置いてくなんて\n 水臭いじゃないですか！:
Captain! I can't believe you left us behind!
That's real cold!

340217.「そうですよ！ こんな傷 たいしたことないのに\n 勝手に 気を使わないでくださ:
He's right! It's just a few scratches.
You don't need to worry so much about us!

340218.「ははっ そうだな……すまなかった。\n アンネリゼ 俺のことより\n あの子の:
Haha, you're right... Sorry about that.
But you should be helping
<pc>'s friend instead of me.

340221.「よかった……。気を失っているみたいだけど\n 命に別状は なさそうだわ。\n:
Thank goodness...he's lost consciousness, but
he's going to be okay. Let's take him back
home to rest.

340222.「それがいい。それから……アンネリゼ。\n おまえに これを 渡しておくよ。\n:
Good idea. And, Anneliese...here.
I found this near the entrance.

340223.「これは 母さんの聖印ね……なつかしいわ。\n 小さかった頃 遊びに持ちだして\:
This is Mother's seal... It sure brings back
memories. When I was little, I used to take
it out to play with and got yelled at...

340224.「兄さん……私 お父さんと お母さんの代わりに\n ずっと やりとげたかったこと:
There's something I've always do in Mother and
Father's stead... I want to pay respects to
the spirits here who lost their lives.

340225.「ふたりも きっと\n それを 望んでいると思うよ。: I'm sure they would've wanted that, too.

340226.「……さまよえる魂よ 悲しみに暮れる者たちよ。\n 我が呼びかけに 応えたまえ。:
O wandering souls, hearts in sorrow's
thrall...
Heed my call, come one and all...

340227.「この光が 汝らを 絶望から解き放ち\n 魂の源へと 導くであろう。:
May this light your despair undo,
and lead your souls to a place anew.

340228.「……我が名は ガリアンテ王国の\n 国王ビョン・ダウ。:
My name is Byon Dauーruler of the kingdom
of Galiant.

340229.「我が一族は かつて 魔皇軍によって滅ぼされ\n 死して なお 長きにわたり\n:
Long ago, my people were annihilated by the
Dark Despot's army. And even in death, we
have known nothing but sorrow and anguish...

340230.「だが……ようやく この呪縛を\n 断ち切ることが できるのだな……。\n 礼を:
But now, at last...we can break free from
this horrible curse. You have my eternal
gratitude...

340231.「どうか 女神様のご加護が あらんことを……。:
May the blessing of the Goddess forever be
upon you...

340232.「オレ なんか 感動しちゃったよ……！\n さすが アンネリゼちゃん！:
I'm...I'm so moved...
You're amazing, Anneliese!

340233.「よくやったな アンネリゼ。\n 父さんと母さんも きっと 見ていてくれたよ。:
You've done well. I'm sure Mother and Father
were watching over you.

340235.「……ところで 隊長。ショルデン殿を 殺害し\n <cs_pchero>殿のご友:
So, Captain... Was it really the Dark Despot's
lackey who murdered Sholden and
captured <cs_pchero>'s friend?

340236.「ああ 間違いない。\n ヤツ……剣魔ゼルゲイドは 魔皇に\n キュルルを献上す:
Yes, I'm positive. That...Zelgeid said he was
going to offer Kyururu to the Despot.

340237.「ええっ！？\n じゃ…じゃあ 魔物たちが暴れてたのも\n 魔皇が 関係してるん:
What?! So what you're saying is...the
Dark Despot ALSO had something to do with
all the monsters going crazy?!

340238.「わからない。\n ……だが ゼルゲイドは\n 再び 俺たちの前に 現れた。:
I don't know. But one thing's for sure...
Zelgeid has shown his hand again.

340239.「俺は これから この一件を\n ソルベルム王国の王に 報告しにいくつもりだ。:
I plan to make my way to Solbelm Kingdom
to report this to the king.

340240.「魔物たちに 破壊されてしまった\n ソルベルム領に続く橋の 修復も\n もう:
The monsters had destroyed the bridge leading
to that region...but it should be repaired by
now.

340241.「俺が不在の間 町のことは頼んだぞ。:
I'm counting on you all to take care of things
in town while I'm away.

340243.「<cs_pchero> 共に来てくれて ありがとう。\n これは 感謝の気持ち:
Thank you for coming here with me,
<cs_pchero>. I'd like you to have this.

340244.「<cs_pchero> 共に来てくれて ありがとう。:
Thank you for coming here with me,
<cs_pchero>.

340245.「今度は 俺が 君の手助けをしたかったんだが\n しばし お別れだ。\n その子:
I wanted to help you this time to return the
favor...but I suppose this is goodbye for now.
I wish Kyururu a speedy recovery.

340247.「これまでどおり 必ず 生きて帰るよ。:
As before...I promise that I'll come back
alive.

340248.<cs_pchero>は 意識を失ったままの\nキュルルを連れて カラマドの剣の:
<cs_pchero> returns to Calamad with
the unconscious Kyururu, along with the Sword
of Calamad and Anneliese in tow.

340251.「小劇場で 突然 倒れて\n そこの兄ちゃんと ここまで運んだんだよ。:
You collapsed out of nowhere at the Theatre,
so that young man and I carried you here.

340252.「そうだわ……私 あの時\n <pc>さんのお友達の\n キュルルを 捜していて:
That's right... We were trying find
your friend Kyururu...

340253.「アンネリゼ……？ どうしたんだ？\n いったい 何があった？:
What's wrong, Anneliese? Did something
happen?

340254.「魔皇の手先…………！: He was one of the Dark Despot's minions!

340256.「魔皇の手先が こんな小さな町の\n しかも 小劇場なんかに\n 何の用が ある:
What business could they have in a tiny little
town like this? Inside the Little Theatre of
all places, no less?!

340257.「いや……きっと 見間違いなんかじゃない。\n 俺も 見たんだ。\n 町の外で:
No...she didn't just imagine it.
I saw it too... One of his familiars, outside
of town...

340259.「幼かったアンネリゼは 両親の後を追って\n 遺構に向かい……連れ戻そうとした:
Anneliese followed our parents to those ruins,
so I went to go and bring her back...
That's when we both saw it happen.

340260.「それがきっかけで あんたたちは\n 魔皇の脅威から 町の人たちを守るために\n:
And that was what led the two o' you to
become both priestess and soldier...to protect
everyone from the threat of the Dark Despot.

340261.「それで エマージュの森で 魔物の親玉が\n 君の手によって 倒された後も\n:
That's why, even after you defeated the monsters' leader in the forest, I kept patrolling the area around town just to be
safe.

340262.「１０年前に あんなことが あったんだ。\n 心配する気持ちも わかるけど\n:
The last time something like that happened was
ten years ago. I understand your concern,
but... Aren't you overthinking all this?

340263.「あれは お父さんと お母さんを殺した\n 魔皇の手先に 間違いないわ……。\n:
I've no doubt that it was the Dark Despot's
minion that killed our parents...
I know what I saw!

340264.「<pc> 共に 小劇場に向かおう。: Let's make our way to the Theatre together.

340266.「心配するな。\n この時のために 鍛錬を積んできたんだ。\n そう簡単に やら:
Don't worry. This moment is exactly what I've
been training so hard for. I won't go down
that easy.

340267.「でも……！\n 兄さんまで いなくなったら……\n 私……私……。:
But... If I lose you too, then I...
I couldn't...

340268.「ナイチルさん すまないが\n アンネリゼのことを 頼みます。:
Sorry to ask this of you, Naichir...
But could you please look after her for
me?

340269.「任せときな。ほら アンネリゼ。\n まだ 休んでなきゃダメだよ。:
You can leave it to me!
Come on, Anneliese. You still need more
rest.

343453.星封の結晶を 使って\nマキュリ集落に 行ってみよう。:
Use the Benevogem to make your way to
Makyuri Village.

343455.「<pc> 会いたかったキュよ！\n こうして またキミと話せる日が 来るなんて:
I missed you so much, <pc>!
To be able to see you again like this...
it's like a dream, kyu!

343456.「ボクが 世界の一部になってから\n キミのことは 遠くから 見守っていたけど\:
Since I became one with the world, I have been
watching over from you afar...but it got
pretty lonely, kyu.

343457.この世界では 屋根のある場所でも 使えます。\nまた『元の世界へ戻る』を選ぶと:
In this world, you can use the Chime of Time in places with roofs. You can also choose "Return to Astoltia" to go back to a place
quite familiar to you.

343458.なお 時渡りの鈴の追加により\n『星封の結晶』は ルーラストーンの\nメニュー内:
With the addition of the Chime of Time,
the Benevogem has been moved to the
Zoomstone menu.

343460.「大丈夫……俺は 必ず 生きて\n おまえのもとへ 帰ってくる。\n だから ゆ:
I'll be all right... I promise that I'll come
back alive. For now, you should get some rest.

343461.「……父さんも 母さんも いつだって\n 困っている人がいたら 手を差し伸べる\:
Both my mother and father were kind-hearted.
They'd always lend a helping hand to
anyone who needed it.

343462.「俺も アンネリゼも\n そんなふたりが 誇りだったんだ。\n それなのに どう:
Anneliese and I were so proud of them.
Just why did things have to end up like
this...?

343464.「本当に アンルシアじゃないキュ……？\n 他人のそら似とは よく言ったものキュ:
So you're really not Anlucia, kyu...? I guess it's true what they say about uncanny resemblances, kyu... Anyways, thank you for
helping me, kyu.

343465.「いいのよ。\n <cs_pchero>さんの お友達は\n 私のお友達でもある:
It's no problem. Any friend of
<cs_pchero>'s is a friend of mine too.

345120.「でも これからは\n また一緒に いられるキュね！:
But we'll be together from now on, won't we,
kyu?

345642.「旅人バザーや酒場……教会みたいに\n 人が集まる場所に行けば\n 情報が 手に:
I think it'll be easier to get information
from places people often gather...like
the Bazaar, the tavern, or the church.

346495.シオンの言うとおり ほおが落ちるほど\nたまらなく おいしい！:
It's just as Shion saidーwhat an absolutely
heavenly taste!

346496.「気に入っていただけたようで なによりです。\n 食べながらで かまいませんので:
I'm glad to see you're enjoying it.
There's something I'd like to say, so
please continue eating.

346497.「この匂いは……チョコレートっキュね！？:
That smell could only be one thing...
It's chocolate, isn't it, kyu?!

346499.キュルルが いない……。\nどうやら 時の回廊で 誰かとぶつかった拍子に\nはぐ:
Kyururu is nowhere to be seen...
He must have gotten separated after crashing
into that unknown person from before.

346500.「その兜 だいぶ傷んでいるから\n 修理に出しておいたほうが よさそうね。:
That helmet is pretty banged up...
I think it'd be best to get it repaired.

350395.……数日後 キュルルは\nようやく 意識を 取り戻した！:
And a few days later...Kyururu finally regains
conciousness!
